title: Macros Calculator - Daily Macronutrient Needs
description: Free macros calculator. Calculate your daily protein, carbs, and fat needs based on your goals - weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain.
keywords: macros calculator, macronutrient calculator, protein carbs fat, TDEE calculator, diet macros
intro: Calculate your daily macronutrient needs (protein, carbs, fat) based on your body stats and fitness goals.

faq.a: Macros (macronutrients) are protein, carbohydrates, and fat - the three main nutrients that provide calories and fuel your body.
First your TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) is calculated, then calories are distributed among protein, carbs, and fat based on your goal.

faq.q: What macro ratio should I use?
faq.a: For weight loss: higher protein (40/30/30). For maintenance: balanced (30/40/30). For muscle gain: higher carbs (30/45/25).
